# Event-Aware Forecasting and Monte Carlo Simulation

The forecasting pipeline trains on 24 months of synthetic history and evaluates on February to April 2026. The interpolation layer blends model demand with hierarchical priors from store-item, store-category, and category-day patterns before Monte Carlo simulation.
